word.definition: To acquiesce to something is to accept it, agree with it, or allow it to happen by staying silent or by not arguing. Acquiesce is somewhat formal, and is often used with in or to .

sports_fact.text: The 'Original Six' era — just six NHL teams — lasted 25 years, until 1967, when the league doubled overnight and the expansion St. Louis Blues were born.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Is Now Close to Prewar Prices, Pushing Gasoline Below $4
market.summary: Stocks jump at open after Iran deal is signed

quote.text: To lead a better life, I need my love to be here. Here, making each day of the year, Changing my life with a wave of her hand. Nobody can deny that there's something there.
quote.author: Paul McCartney

history.text: The Lockheed F-117 Nighthawk, the first operational aircraft initially designed around stealth technology, makes its first flight.
